ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the recorded market data */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency in the recorded time interval */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency in the recorded time interval */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency in the recorded time interval */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency in the recorded time interval */,
  "volume_from" REAL /* Volume of trades for the cryptocurrency from one currency to another */,
  "volume_to" REAL /* Volume of trades for the cryptocurrency to another currency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "percent_change_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in price in the last 1 hour */,
  "percent_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price in the last 24 hours */,
  "percent_change_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price in the last 7 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or abbreviation of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to mine a block */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward for mining a block */,
  "total_coins_mined" INTEGER /* Total number of coins mined */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username selected by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "kyc_status" TEXT /* KYC (Know Your Customer) status of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade execution */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee paid for the trade */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the trade */,
  "price_before" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency before the trade */,
  "price_after" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency after the trade */,
  "volume_before" REAL /* Volume of cryptocurrency before the trade */,
  "volume_after" REAL /* Volume of cryptocurrency after the trade */,
  "market_impact" REAL /* Impact of the trade on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "balance" REAL /* Total balance of the user for the cryptocurrency */,
  "available_balance" REAL /* Available balance for trading and withdrawal */,
  "reserved_balance" REAL /* Reserved balance for pending trades and fees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_balances_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notified_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* Generated API key for accessing the trading platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the API key expires */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_start" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend started */,
  "trend_end" TEXT /* Date and time when the trend ended */,
  "trend_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trend (e.g., up, down) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., latency, uptime) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
